statement.en: 《王懷萱:二十世紀中國歷史風暴中如塵的人生》 Wang Huaixuan: A Life Like Dust in the Storms of Twentieth-Century Chinese History.
statement.summary: 王抗曝 (Lawrence K. Wang). (2026). 《王懷萱:二十世紀中國歷史風暴中如塵的人生》Wang Huaixuan: A Life Like Dust in the Storms of Twentieth-Century Chinese History. Global Humanities and Liberal Arts, 2026(5A). Lenox Institute Press, Auburndale, Massachusetts, USA.; 27 pages. 摘要 : 本文為紀念 王懷萱先生(字若塵) 辭世二十五週年所整理的紀念傳略。王懷萱生於浙江江山縣,其父為著名軍事將領 王蒲臣將軍,曾榮獲中華民國 蔣中正總統頒授之雲麾勳章。作為將門之子,他早年接受法律與刑事警察專業教育,並接受刑事偵查與情報相關訓練。然而 1949 年中國政局劇變 後,國共對峙與兩岸分治改變了他的人生。他曾於中國大陸遭到監禁,後逃回台灣,但其後大半生因政治疑慮而處於限制自由或監禁之中。儘管如此,他始終忠貞愛國,從未認為自己做錯任何事情。直到 2001 年人生將近終點時,中華民國 陳水扁總統對其予以特赦,承認其所遭遇的不幸多為大時代歷史動盪所造成。本文原為作者 2001 年悼念長兄所撰寫之悼文,今於 2026 年二十五週年 修訂出版。ABSTRACT: This commemorative essay honors the life of Mr. Wang Huaixuan (courtesy name Ruochén) whose life was deeply shaped by the political upheavals of twentieth-century China. He was born in Jiangshan County of Zhejian

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a commemorative biographical essay (2001 original, 2026 revision) about a historical figure affected by 20th-century Chinese political upheavals. It is not a falsifiable empirical claim or formal theorem, but rather a narrative reconstruction with documented historical context (father's military rank, presidential pardon in 2001). The truth-status is provisionally established through archival/testimonial evidence but remains subject to revision as new sources emerge. Categorized as FLOWING because: (1) it undergoes revision across time (2001→2026), (2) biographical interpretation admits multiple valid framings, (3) historical narrative validation is ongoing rather than closed.
